title: US Markets Wrap Up Strong Week With Gains
text: U.S. markets closed out a winning week with fresh gains Friday, buoyed by economic reports showing inflation easing and consumer sentiment on the rise.

title: Blue-Chip Stocks And Red Flags - Things To Consider In Your Due Diligence
text: Investing in blue-chip companies that pay dividends and relentlessly focusing on reinvesting the proceeds is a proven strategy for reliable long-term returns. But what about the occasional black swan? Potentially devastating litigation? Overlooked liabilities on the balance sheet? Financial engineering?

title: My 6-Figure Market-Beating Dividend Growth Portfolio
text: As requested by many, I decided to dedicate an article to my personal dividend growth portfolio, consisting of more than 90% of my net worth. I start by explaining my strategy and approach, followed by a discussion of the benefits that come with dividend (growth) investment strategies.
